sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 39

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 39:1
items.html: (to the question) Only the Yesod of ZA [Zeir Anpin] rose entirely and became the upper third of Tiferet; but Netzah and Hod of ZA raised to Hesed and Gevura only their upper thirds. Therefore the two lower thirds of each of Netzah and Hod remained below in their place, and the Nukva had from them to receive for her own discernment of Netzah and Hod. See Answer 142. (p. 784, beginning "And there is not")
